channel.title: 阅读 on Simon's Lodge
channel.description: Recent content in 阅读 on Simon's Lodge

item.title: 麦田里的守望者
item.description: What I have to do, I have to catch everybody if they start to go over the cliff—I mean if they’re running and they don’t look where they’re going. I have to come out from somewhere and catch them. That’s all I’d do all day. I’d just be the catcher in the rye and all. I know it’s crazy, but that’s the only thing I’d really like to be. I know it’s crazy.
